reason: Format coefficients were confounded with show identity (only 3 scored shows), calibrated against an opaque small sample, and silently penalized multi-cam formats by 15-25%. Raw scores with explicit format tagging is more statistically defensible and more transparent.
approach: Report raw scores. Tag each show with its format. Offer format-filtered leaderboards. Let the reader interpret.
added_fields: humor_index_v1 — the previous score with the format coefficient applied, preserved for transparency
ci_95_low / ci_95_high — bootstrap 95% confidence interval from joke-level (episode) or episode-level (season/show) resampling
percentile_in_show — episode ranked among its own show
